title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan ships large codebases using Claude Code, extracting four key strategies: role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tool building, and upfront planning. The analysis draws from Tan's public approach and his open-source gstack framework.
